name: Transporter creation (address form)
pageTitle: Add private transporter - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
caption: DRAFT.GB.2026.1525979 - CHEDP
heading: Add private transporter

journeyContext.reachedVia: Transporter Page ('Add a transporter' link) -> Search Existing Transporter Page ('Create a new transporter' link) -> this Transporter Creation Page. After saving, a Transporter Confirmation Page ('Add to notification' button) appends the created transporter to the notification, returning to the Transporter Page.
journeyContext.parallelPath: There is a parallel 'select an existing transporter' branch on the Transporter Page (TransporterPage.btnSelect 'Select' / radioNo group) that bypasses this creation form entirely — exercised in CHED-A (ched-a-accessibility-tests.spec.ts:134 pages.transporter.btnSelect.first().click()). The private-transporter creation form is only reached when the user chooses 'Create a new transporter'.

structure.govukComponent: Caption (page-header block above main, not a govuk-caption-* class)
Fieldset with legend (govuk-fieldset, govuk-fieldset__legend--m) wrapping the address fields

govukComponents.usage: Groups the address block under the 'Transporter' legend
Field labels; govuk-label--m used for the top-level 'Transporter name' label
Transporter name, Address line 1/2/3, City or town, Postcode or ZIP code, Telephone number, Email address — 8 govuk-input controls (6 text + 1 tel + 1 email), all width-constrained to one-half
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:7-41 exposes exactly these controls by accessible name (no additional inputs).

govukComponents.usage: Country selector (254 options incl. placeholder); carries govuk-!-width-one-half like the text inputs
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144; page object TransporterCreationPage.ts:35-37 (dropdownCountry via getByLabel('Country'), driven with selectOption(value))

govukComponents.usage: 'Return to search' link back to the transporter search page
Paragraph wrapping the 'Return to search' link

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: Country as a native <select> (govuk-select) rather than accessible-autocomplete
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Plain 254-option native select for choosing the transporter's country
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Not itself non-govuk (govuk-select is a real Design System component), but a 254-long native select is a poor UX for a long reference-data list. Other IPAFFS pages use accessible-autocomplete for country pickers; here it is a bare select.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk Select is acceptable; the new app should source the country list from a reference-data service and consider accessible-autocomplete for typeahead

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: Caption 'DRAFT.GB.2026.1525979 - CHEDP' rendered in the page-header block above <main>, not via a govuk-caption-* class inside main
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Shows the draft CHED reference as a section caption
nonStandardPatterns.concern: The reference caption sits outside <main> in a bespoke header region rather than as a govuk-caption-xl inside the content column. Minor structural deviation.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-caption-xl / govuk-caption-l placed above the H1 inside main

fields.name: company-name
fields.label: Transporter name
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144 (id/name=company-name). Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:7-9 inputTransporterName getByRole('textbox',{name:'Transporter name'}); default value ched-p-workflows.ts:188 'Bärenwald Bär GmbH'. required=false is trace-observed (no HTML required attr); mandatoriness server-side is a gap — no test drives an empty submit.

fields.name: address-line-1
fields.label: Address line 1
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:11-13; default ched-p-workflows.ts:189 '103 Main St'.

fields.name: address-line-2
fields.label: Address line 2 (optional)
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:15-17; label carries '(optional)' suffix; default ched-p-workflows.ts:190 'Suite 4'.

fields.name: address-line-3
fields.label: Address line 3 (optional)
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:19-21; label carries '(optional)' suffix; default ched-p-workflows.ts:191 'Building 3'.

fields.name: city-or-town
fields.label: City or town
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144 (the fill action itself; input has autocomplete=address-level2). Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:23-25; default ched-p-workflows.ts:192 'Springfield'.

fields.name: postcode
fields.label: Postcode or ZIP code
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:27-29 inputPostcodeOrZipCode; default ched-p-workflows.ts:193 '10000' (note: a non-UK-format free-text postcode/ZIP).

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144 (input type=tel). Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:31-33; default ched-p-workflows.ts:194 '01100100100'.

fields.name: country
fields.label: Country
fields.optionValueFormat: Option VALUES are ISO-3166-style reference-data codes, not the display labels. England = 'GB-ENG' (also GB-SCT Scotland, GB-WLS Wales — country.ts:238-241). The tests drive selectOption by value, so the new app must key the country list on codes, not visible names.
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144. 254 options incl. placeholder 'Please select your country'. Reference data — the list interleaves countries with UK constituent nations (England, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland) after 'United Arab Emirates'; the new app should source this from a reference-data service, not hardcode it. Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:35-37 (getByLabel('Country').selectOption(address.country)); option value 'GB-ENG' from country.ts:238 via ched-p-workflows.ts:195 country: country.England.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 144 (input type=email). Corroborated: TransporterCreationPage.ts:39-41; default ched-p-workflows.ts:196 'techsolutions@example.com'.

openQuestions: MANDATORINESS IS A GAP. No required attributes are set on any control (all required=false, trace-observed); IPAFFS validates server-side. The QA suite does not exercise validation on this page — fillAddress (TransporterCreationPage.ts:47-57) always populates all 9 fields, and no test submits the form empty or partially, so no error state was ever rendered or asserted. Which of these fields are mandatory for a private transporter (name? address line 1? country?) cannot be answered from traces or tests — a question for a human / the domain rules.

VALIDATION COPY IS A GAP. validationMessages is empty and honestly so: no trace rendered a field error on this page and no test asserts an error string here. Do not fabricate; the new app's validation messages for the transporter address are undefined by these two sources.
No hint text on any field (0 govuk-hint elements) in the trace; the page object exposes no hint-bearing controls either.

COMPLETENESS CORROBORATED (not just a lower bound here). TransporterCreationPage.ts:7-45 exposes exactly the 9 inputs + Save-and-continue already captured in the trace and no others — so for this page the trace is not undercounting fields. The address model is the flat 9-field Address type (types/address.ts:1-11): name, addressLine1, addressLine2, addressLine3, cityOrTown, postcode, telephone, country, email.

PARALLEL 'EXISTING TRANSPORTER' PATH CONFIRMED (resolves prior open question). This 'Add private transporter' creation form is only one branch. It is reached via Transporter Page 'Add a transporter' -> Search Existing Transporter Page 'Create a new transporter' (SearchExistingTransporterPage.ts:6-8; ched-p-workflows.ts:504-511). The Transporter Page also offers selecting a pre-existing transporter (TransporterPage.ts:12 btnSelect 'Select', TransporterPage.ts:9 radioNo group) — exercised in CHED-A (ched-a-accessibility-tests.spec.ts:133-140) which selects an existing transporter and skips creation. The new IUU app must decide whether to support both a free-text create form and a saved-transporter picker.

Page URL confirmed from returnUrl as .../{chedReference}/traders/private-transporter/new — the task's inferred '.../transporter/create' pattern is not what IPAFFS uses. The related search page is .../{chedReference}/traders/transporter/search.

This is specifically the 'Add private transporter' variant (inputs carry title='private transporter'). The 'search existing / select known transporter' path exists (see above); the creation form for a private transporter is the only variant a trace exercised.

This page sits AFTER the Goods Movement Services page (Common Transit + 'use a transport service' radios, ched-p-workflows.ts:487-501). Whether those upstream answers gate the transporter section at all is not evidenced here — a gap for a human.

Postcode field is free text ('Postcode or ZIP code') and the sample value '10000' is not a UK postcode — no format validation was observed. Country + postcode format coupling (UK vs ROW) is undefined by these sources.

Evidence is from a CHED-P Fish notification (ched-p-notification.spec.ts:206 'B2C Importer ... Submits Valid CHEDP Fish Notification'), which is the IPAFFS filing route for IUU fishery products. The transporter form is shared journey furniture (same page object drives CHED-P and CHED-A); no IUU-specific transporter fields were observed.
